alternatives.text: Limit ad personalization via Data & Privacy dashboard
Download your data via Google Takeout before deleting
Switch to a privacy-focused search engine like DuckDuckGo

notes: Account deletion is permanent and removes access to all Google services.

alternatives.text: Deactivate instead of delete to preserve data temporarily
Limit tracking via Off-Facebook Activity tool
Use Facebook Container extension (Firefox)

notes: Meta retains some data for legal compliance even after deletion.

alternatives.text: Download your archive before deactivating
Revoke third-party app access before deletion

notes: Account is deactivated for 30 days before permanent deletion.

alternatives.text: Download your archive before deactivating
Revoke third-party app access before deletion

notes: Account is deactivated for 30 days before permanent deletion.

alternatives.text: Temporarily disable account instead of deleting
Download your data before deleting

notes: Must be done via mobile app or web — not available in the main settings menu.

alternatives.text: Download your data before closing the account
Adjust privacy settings to limit profile visibility

notes: LinkedIn retains some data for safety and legal purposes.

alternatives.text: Opt out of personalized ads via Ad Preferences
Submit a CCPA/GDPR data request
Manage Alexa privacy settings

notes: Full account deletion requires contacting customer service. Some order history is retained for legal reasons.

alternatives.text: Export your repositories and data before deleting
Revoke OAuth app access before deletion

notes: Deleting your account removes all repositories, gists, and profile data.

alternatives.text: Opt out of personalized ads in Reddit settings
Request your data via Reddit's data portal

notes: Posts and comments remain visible after account deletion unless manually removed first.

alternatives.text: Cancel your subscription first
Opt out of marketing emails in account settings

notes: Netflix retains data for up to 10 months after account closure.

alternatives.text: Download your data before closing the account
Revoke third-party app access in account settings

notes: Playlists and listening history are permanently deleted.

alternatives.text: Download your Apple data first via Privacy portal
Deactivate Apple ID temporarily instead of deleting

notes: Deleting your Apple ID removes access to all Apple services and purchases.

alternatives.text: Manage your data via Microsoft Privacy Dashboard
Opt out of personalized ads

notes: Account closure has a 60-day grace period before permanent deletion.

alternatives.text: Contact PayPal support to initiate account closure
Review PayPal's privacy settings

notes: PayPal retains transaction records for legal and regulatory compliance.

alternatives.text: Manage privacy settings in the Uber app
Submit a GDPR/CCPA data request

notes: Trip history may be retained for legal and safety purposes.

alternatives.text: Download your Airbnb data before requesting deletion
Contact Airbnb support via the Help Center

notes: Reviews you've written may remain visible after account deletion.

alternatives.text: Download all your files before deleting
Revoke third-party app access first

notes: Files are permanently deleted after a 30-day grace period.

alternatives.text: Export your messages before leaving workspaces
Review Slack's privacy controls

notes: Workspace admins may retain message history even after you leave.

alternatives.text: Opt out of data sharing in Zoom privacy settings
Submit a GDPR/CCPA request via Zoom's privacy portal

notes: Meeting recordings stored in Zoom Cloud are deleted with the account.

alternatives.text: Download your TikTok data before deleting
Opt out of personalized ads in privacy settings

notes: Account is deactivated for 30 days before permanent deletion.
